pages.key_finding: Despite an increase in user stickiness to 10.8%, the 55% drop in MAU signals a shrinking user base. Furthermore, the 54.9% pre-gameplay drop-off highlights a critical need to drastically improve early onboarding retention.

pages.title: Game Performance (Score)
pages.key_finding: Game performance saw a steep decline, with the average daily score dropping 66.8% from 87,248 in January to 28,986 in February. This drastic reduction suggests the remaining user base is completing significantly fewer levels per session.

pages.title: Game Performance (Time)
pages.key_finding: Session durations dropped by 63.1%, falling from 32 minutes in January to just 15 minutes. This severe contraction in playtime aligns with lower scores and points to an urgent need for fresh re-engagement mechanics.

pages.title: Most-played stages | Most-cooked menus
pages.key_finding: Players heavily favor everyday meals, with 'Umami Daily' as the top stage and 'ข้าวผัดหมู' as the leading menu. Future content updates should leverage these relatable themes to re-attract lapsed players effectively.

metrics.Top Menu: ข้าวผัดหมู
